ref: Lamech said, “I'll name him Noah because he will give us comfort, as we struggle hard to make a living on this land that the Lord has put under a curse.”

translated: If you are truly a child of God, "I will not let you go until you bless me" like Jacob did. But as for me, I am a child of God, so I will not be afraid.

translated: And he said to him, “Go and see if your brothers are well and if the flock is safe.” But Jacob said to him, “I am here; send me, for I will go and see if they are well and bring you word.”

ref: So God created humans to be like himself; he made men and women.

translated: God has shown us his love by sending his only Son into the world, so that we may live through him. He is the one who sent his Son to be the sacrifice that takes away our sins.
